title: Party Invitations Pack of 36. Blue Starburst Themed Invitation with Matching envelopes. 120 x 172mm. Party Invites, Birthday Party Invitations. Suitable for All Ages.
features: BIRTHDAY INVITATIONS - 120 x 172mm printed both sides. 36 Invites supplied with 36 matching envelopes in sturdy carton. Party Invites for all ages.
MADE IN THE UK – Designed, printed and packed in the UK, our invitations are made from board which is manufactured in Europe. Reverse designed with plenty of room for party details.

CARBON CAPTURE – We offset any CO2 emissions produced in the manufacture of our paper and board when purchasing by either planting woodlands right here in the UK or by preserving high conservation value forests.
PREMIUM QUALITY THICK CARD – 275 Micron sturdy card with uncoated finish to allow writing with almost any pen. Supplied with premium quality envelopes.
description: Looking after our planet is important to us, so all our products are manufactured with protecting our planet in mind. Where possible we source our materials locally. We also capture the CO2 emissions from our paper purchases by planting native woodland or by protecting the Amazon rainforests. Our paper is from well-managed, FSC-certified forests and other controlled sources. Our inks, foils, cards and envelopes are all recyclable.
